questions.question: What is the main topic Paul addresses in this chapter?
What does Paul say about his own preference regarding marriage?
options: He wishes all were single as he is
questions.answer: He wishes all were single as he is

questions.question: Paul commands that a believing spouse must leave an unbelieving partner.
Each person should remain in the _____ in which they were called.
The time is short. From now on, those who have wives should live as though they had _____.
